meta.title: 4 Problems Ukraine needs to solve before getting F-16s
meta.description:
The F-16 Fighting Falcon is among the world's most capable and broadly operated 4th generation fighters... but that doesn't mean it'll be easy to get them flying for Ukraine. 

Here are four of the biggest challenges that need to be overcome before Ukraine can start operating their own fleets of F-16s, according to Sandboxx News editor-in-chief, Alex Hollings.
